## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m pytest` is green
- [ ] Architecture boundaries respected (core/adapter neutral; country rules in `standards.py`)
- [ ] Importable modules still at repo root
- [ ] `manifest.json` updated if a component/module was added or renamed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-facing changes
- [ ] Target branch is `develop` (or `main` only for a release)
